scope.claim: owner-approved frozen geometry and pressure-funnel interface contract only

terminology.explanation: Twelve counts total cell members: ten peripheral vortex-funnels plus two mobile eyes.

countSemantics.note: The two mobile eyes are the sixth members of their cells and also the upper/lower nodes of the three-node spine. The central junction is a hinge, not a thirteenth cell member. The final one is a derived apparent axis, not an additional node.

cells.candidateHandednessRule: five compatible right-handed flows in transported local frames
five compatible left-handed flows in transported local frames

pressurePotential.forceDensityDefinition: f=-gradient(P) in the transported local frame
pressurePotential.longitudinalInwardComponent: -dP/ds times gradient(s); on the centerline it points along +T toward increasing s
pressurePotential.radialConfinementComponent: -dP/drho times e_rho; it points toward rho=0

energyMomentumDensity.units: declared reduced simulation units; Phase 1 must log injection, damping, and loss separately

localFrame.definition: right-handed transported frame F=[T,N,B] evaluated along c(s)

pressureFunnelFieldContract.centerlineParameter: s in [0,1], oriented from outer boundary to reference eye
pressureFunnelFieldContract.radialCoordinate: rho in [0,R_i(s)] measured in the local N/B plane
pressureFunnelFieldContract.forceDensityDefinition: f_i=-gradient(P_i) in the funnel's transported T/N/B frame

overlapRule.selectionRule: mutual nearest cross-cell curves under the threshold

overlapFrameTransportRule.phaseTransport: phase is advanced by the oriented local-frame rotation; no world-axis phase is used
overlapFrameTransportRule.energyAccounting: unweighted frame rotation preserves vector norm; overlap weight and any loss are logged separately

phase1MobileEyeIsolationContract.enabledGeometry: one fixed five-funnel crown plus one independent mobile eye
phase1MobileEyeIsolationContract.containmentSource: local resultant of the declared fixed pressure-funnel fields only
